signals.title: GBP/JPY — G10 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: GBP/JPY at 215.784 — 275bp BoE-BoJ carry advantage sustains GBP bid; G10 scorecard shows GBP +0.704% vs JPY -0.636% (spread 1.340%). Carry and strength metrics align for GBP outperformance.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.6894 — COT LF net long +29,035 (bullish spec positioning) and HV30 at 6.9% with ATM IV at 24.9% (VRP +18.0%). Options market pricing elevated protection; positioning stalling — late-trend caution.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −23,314 (specs fading a hawkish CB) vs RBNZ hike prob 67% priced for 8 Jul. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5800+. NZD/USD at 0.5673.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Options Skew
signals.text: EUR/USD 25d RR at −0.38 — mild put skew signals options market biased for EUR weakness. Positioning neutral; monitor for directional conviction.

signals.title: USD/CHF — Volatility Regime
signals.text: USD/CHF IV 14.3% vs HV30 6.0% — VRP +8.2%. Elevated vol premium; monitor for mean reversion.
